race.comment: DAISY DUCK (10) only warmed late last start when dropping back to the 1000m at Quirindi off 61-day freshen for her stable debut. The rise in trip suits and she draws to get all the favours from the inside. Bold showing anticipated. STORMY SEAS (6) is a three-year-old gelding on debut by The Autumn Sun from the handy mare Royal Tithe who has been a prolific producer including Listed winner Royalzel. Showed good improvement in his most recent trial and hails from a strong juvenile stable. Bullock's booking signals stable confidence. Big watch. FORWARDING (2) has shown great versatility with his speed, launching home to just miss last time after leading them up the run prior. Draws sticky but boasts a fitness/experience edge. Keeping safe. AKUMA (1) is racing well and can play a leading role.
